questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I live in London», — сказала она?

choices.text: She said she lives in London.
She said she lived in London.
She said she is living in London.
She said she had lived in London.

questions.explanation: Present Simple в прямой речи сдвигается в Past Simple в косвенной, поэтому «I live» становится «she lived».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I am reading a book», — сказал он?

choices.text: He said he reads a book.
He said he was reading a book.
He said he read a book.
He said he had read a book.

questions.explanation: Present Continuous сдвигается в Past Continuous, поэтому «I am reading» становится «he was reading».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «We will go to the park», — сказали они?

choices.text: They said they will go to the park.
They said they would go to the park.
They said they went to the park.
They said they had gone to the park.

questions.explanation: will сдвигается в would, поэтому «We will go» становится «they would go».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I finished my homework», — сказала она?

choices.text: She said she finished her homework.
She said she had finished her homework.
She said she was finishing her homework.
She said she has finished her homework.

questions.explanation: Past Simple сдвигается в Past Perfect, поэтому «I finished» становится «she had finished».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I like apples», — сказал он?

choices.text: He said he likes apples.
He said he liked apples.
He said he is liking apples.
He said he would like apples.

questions.explanation: Present Simple сдвигается в Past Simple, поэтому «I like» становится «he liked».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I am studying English», — сказала она?

choices.text: She said she studies English.
She said she was studying English.
She said she studied English.
She said she had studied English.

questions.explanation: Present Continuous сдвигается в Past Continuous, поэтому «I am studying» становится «she was studying».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I will call you tomorrow», — сказал он?

choices.text: He said he will call you tomorrow.
He said he would call you tomorrow.
He said he called you tomorrow.
He said he had called you tomorrow.

questions.explanation: will сдвигается в would, поэтому «I will call» становится «he would call».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I went to the store», — сказала она?

choices.text: She said she went to the store.
She said she had gone to the store.
She said she was going to the store.
She said she goes to the store.

questions.explanation: Past Simple сдвигается в Past Perfect, поэтому «I went» становится «she had gone».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «We are having a meeting», — сказали они?

choices.text: They said they have a meeting.
They said they were having a meeting.
They said they had a meeting.
They said they are having a meeting.

questions.explanation: Present Continuous сдвигается в Past Continuous, поэтому «We are having» становится «they were having».

questions.prompt: Как правильно передать косвенную речь для: «I will see you soon», — сказал он?

choices.text: He said he will see you soon.
He said he would see you soon.
He said he saw you soon.
He said he had seen you soon.

questions.explanation: will сдвигается в would, поэтому «I will see» становится «he would see».
